calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-24-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-08-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James DeMartini for and with petitioner Kevin Bushnell.

The Court expressed concern regarding distributions made without prior Court approval. Mr. DeMartini stated that the administrator has now filed a verified amendment and supplemental declaration addressing the distributions, and provided a copy to the Court for review. He apologized to the Court regarding the distribution which had been made. He stated that the administrator now knows that it was improper to make distributions without prior court approval. The Court granted the petition allowing final distribution and payment of fees
(order signed).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)
